Package org.rodinp.core.tests

Class CopyMoveTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.AbstractRodinDBTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.ModifyingResourceTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.CopyMoveTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
CopyMoveElementsTests, CopyMoveResourcesTests, RootElementTests
public abstract class CopyMoveTests extends ModifyingResourceTests

  • Method Details

    • copyNegative

      public void copyNegative(IRodinElement element, IRodinElement destination, IRodinElement sibling, String rename, boolean force, int failureCode)
      Attempts to copy the element with optional forcing. The operation should fail with the failure code.

    • copyNegative

      public void copyNegative(IRodinElement[] elements, IRodinElement[] destinations, IRodinElement[] siblings, String[] renames, boolean force, int failureCode)
      Attempts to copy the elements with optional forcing. The operation should fail with the failure code.

    • copyPositive

      public IRodinElement copyPositive(IElementManipulation element, IRodinElement container, IRodinElement sibling, String rename, boolean force) throws RodinDBException
      Copies the element to the container with optional rename and forcing. The operation should succeed, so any exceptions encountered are thrown.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • copyNoop

      public void copyNoop(IRodinElement element, IRodinElement sibling) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Check that dumb copy of an element to itself doesn't change anything. The operation should succeed, so any exceptions encountered are thrown.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • generateHandle

      public IRodinElement generateHandle(IRodinElement original, String rename, IRodinElement container)
      Generates a new handle to the original element in its new container.

      public void moveNegative(IRodinElement element, IRodinElement destination, IRodinElement sibling, String rename, boolean force, int failureCode)
      Attempts to move the element with optional forcing. The operation should fail with the failure code.

      Attempts to move the element with optional forcing. The operation should fail with the failure code.

      Check that dumb move of an element to itself doesn't change anything. The operation should succeed, so any exceptions encountered are thrown.

      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
